zh.lifeSummary: 當George Ely於1545年出生在英國英格蘭肯特騰特爾登時，他的父親William Elye28歲，母親Mary Ely29歲。他於1567年與Florence Tylden在英國英格蘭肯特騰特爾登結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1615年8月16日在英國肯特貝黑斯達享年70歲，埋葬在英國肯特騰特爾登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当George Ely于1545年出生在英国英格兰肯特騰特爾登时，他的父亲William Elye28岁，母亲Mary Ely29岁。他于1567年与Florence Tylden在英国英格兰肯特騰特爾登结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1615年8月16日在英国肯特貝黑斯達享年70岁，埋葬在英国肯特騰特爾登。

nameMeanings.name: Ely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Ely, a cathedral city on an island in the fens north of Cambridge, so named from Old English ǣl ‘eel’ + gē ‘district’.
English, French, and Breton (Finistère): from the Middle English, Old French personal name Elie, Hely (Elijah in the King James Bible); see Ellis and Elias .

variants.name: Ellis
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Elis, an Old French vernacular form of Elias, the Latin and New Testament Greek form of Hebrew Eliyahu; see Elijah and compare Elias , Lias , Ely .
English: possibly in some instances from the Middle English female personal name Elice, a pet form of Elizabeth .

Welsh: from Elis, a shortened form of the Welsh personal name Elisse (earlier Elisedd, a derivative of elus ‘kindly, benevolent’). As usual in Welsh, the stress in Elisse is on the penultimate syllable -li-, which shifts to initial El- when the name is shortened to Elis. It later became confused with Ellis in 1 above.

variants.name: Iley
meanings: English (Durham): habitational name from Brent Eleigh or Monks Eleigh in Suffolk, or perhaps from Illey in Worcestershire. The Suffolk placename derives from an Old English personal name Illa (genitive Illan) + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The Worcestershire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hilla or Illa + lēah. Alternatively, the name may be a variant of Ely .
Perhaps an Americanized form of German   Ihle  .

variants.name: Elley
meanings: English: variant of   Ely   or   Ella  .

variants.name: Eley
meanings: German: from a vernacular form of the medieval personal name Eligius (see Eligio ), a Christian saint's name.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When George Ely was born in 1545, in Tenterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Elye, was 28 and his mother, Mary Ely, was 29. He married Florence Tylden in 1567, in Tenterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 16 August 1615, in Bethersden, Kent, England, at the age of 70, and was buried in Tenterden, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque George Ely est né en 1545, à Tenterden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Elye, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Mary Ely, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Florence Tylden en 1567, à Tenterden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 16 août 1615, à Bethersden, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Tenterden, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als George Ely 1545 in Tenterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Elye 28 und seine Mutter Mary Ely 29. Er hat 1567 in Tenterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom Florence Tylden geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 16. August 1615 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Bethersden, Kent, England und wurde in Tenterden, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando George Ely è nato il nel 1545 nel Tenterden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Elye, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Mary Ely, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Florence Tylden nel 1567, nel Tenterden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 16 agosto 1615, nel Bethersden, Kent, England, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Tenterden, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: George Elyが1545年にイギリスイギリスケントテンテルデンで生まれた時，父William Elyeは28歳，母Mary Elyは29歳であった。1567年にイギリスイギリスケントテンテルデンでFlorence Tyldenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1615年8月16日にイギリスケントベスエルスデンで70歳で死去し，イギリスケントテンテルデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: George Ely(이)가 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 텐터든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Elye(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Ely(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1567년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 텐터든에서 Florence Tylden(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1615년 8월 16일 영국 켄트 베더즈든에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 텐터든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando George Ely nasceu em 1545, em Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Elye, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Mary Ely, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Florence Tylden em 1567, em Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de agosto de 1615, em Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда George Ely родился в 1545 г. в местности тентирден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Elye было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Ely, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Florence Tylden в 1567 г. в местности тентирден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 16 августа 1615 г. в местности бетирсден, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности тентирден, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando George Ely nació en 1545, en Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Elye, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Mary Ely, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Florence Tylden en 1567, en Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 16 de agosto de 1615, en Bethersden, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Tenterden, Kent, Inglaterra.
